mapper.select: SELECT ab.ASGMT_SN, ab.CLASS_SN, ab.RGTR_USER_ID, ab.ASGMT_SJ, ab.SBMT_DDLN_DT, ab.ASGMT_STAT_CD, ab.REG_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s WHERE s.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN) AS SBMT_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = ab.CLASS_SN AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = '01') AS TOT_MEMBER_CNT FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ORDER BY ab.REG_DT DESC

SELECT ab.ASGMT_SN, ab.CLASS_SN, ab.RGTR_USER_ID, ab.ASGMT_SJ, ab.ASGMT_CN, ab.SBMT_DDLN_DT, ab.ASGMT_STAT_CD, ab.REG_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s WHERE s.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN) AS SBMT_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = ab.CLASS_SN AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = '01') AS TOT_MEMBER_CNT FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab WHERE ab.ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn}
